items.name: animated-tabs
items.title: Animated Tabs
items.description: Tabs with smooth animated indicator transitions.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: A card with an animated beam traveling along its border.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A fully-featured, animated data table with sorting, search, selection, inline editing, column resizing, and pagination.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: A macOS-style dock with magnification effect on hover.

items.name: dot-matrix
items.title: Dot Matrix
items.description: An animated dot matrix background pattern.

items.name: editable-text
items.title: Editable Text
items.description: Inline editable text with animated border reveal, shimmer effect, and smooth save/cancel controls.

items.name: gradient-sidebar
items.title: Gradient Sidebar
items.description: A sidebar with animated gradient orb background and collapsible sections.

items.name: kanban-board
items.title: Kanban Board
items.description: A drag-and-drop kanban board with collapsible columns and animated card transitions.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: A button that magnetically attracts toward the cursor on hover.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: An infinite scrolling marquee with configurable speed and direction.

items.name: metallic-lava
items.title: Metallic Lava
items.description: An animated metallic lava background using WebGL shaders.

items.name: moving-gradient-button
items.title: Moving Gradient Button
items.description: A button that reveals a spinning gradient border and flowing gradient text on hover.

items.name: moving-gradient-text
items.title: Moving Gradient Text
items.description: Text with a continuously flowing gradient animation.

items.name: nebula
items.title: Nebula
items.description: An animated nebula cloud background using WebGL shaders.

items.name: pulse-button
items.title: Pulse Button
items.description: A button with a pulsing glow animation.

items.name: reorderable-list
items.title: Reorderable List
items.description: A drag-and-drop sortable list with smooth animations.

items.name: ripple
items.title: Ripple
items.description: A ripple effect animation on click.

items.name: scramble-text
items.title: Scramble Text
items.description: Text that scrambles through random characters before resolving.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card with a spotlight effect that follows the cursor.

items.name: tilt-card
items.title: Tilt Card
items.description: A card that tilts toward the cursor with a 3D perspective effect.
